name: SecondBrainAgent_delta_v30_7_P1_runtime_store_bridge
changes: P1RagRuntime selects configured RagStore instead of hard-wired SQLiteRagStore
RagStore contract extended with delete_document_payload, all_chunks, embedding_summary, validation_snapshot
SQLiteRagStore and PgVectorRagStore implement the read/delete/snapshot contract
P1 status, sources, validation and reindex are store-backed
New tests validate runtime store selection and store-backed validation
